BuildConfig example

Here is the decompiled BuildConfig class:

java
1// sources/gov/whitehouse/app/BuildConfig.java
2
3public final class BuildConfig {
4    public static final String APPLICATION_ID = "gov.whitehouse.app";
5    public static final String BUILD_TYPE = "release";
6    public static final boolean DEBUG = false;
7    public static final int VERSION_CODE = 20;
8    public static final String VERSION_NAME = "47.0.1";
9}

The app targets Android and uses the new architecture.
